title: Salesforce Flow Segmentation Configuration
description: Configuration for Flow Segmentation System including thresholds, templates, pattern detection, and guidance messages

complexity_thresholds._description: Thresholds for determining when segmentation is beneficial

SEGMENTATION_THRESHOLD.description: Minimum complexity score to recommend segmentation
SEGMENTATION_THRESHOLD.usage: Flows below this threshold may not benefit from segmentation overhead

SIMPLE_MODE_THRESHOLD.description: Maximum complexity for Simple Edit Mode
SIMPLE_MODE_THRESHOLD.usage: Flows at or below this threshold can use Quick Edit Mode safely

FORCE_SEGMENTATION_THRESHOLD.description: Complexity level where segmentation is strongly advised
FORCE_SEGMENTATION_THRESHOLD.usage: Flows at this complexity should always use segmentation

CRITICAL_COMPLEXITY_THRESHOLD.description: Critical complexity indicating flow should be refactored
CRITICAL_COMPLEXITY_THRESHOLD.usage: Suggest breaking into subflows at this level

complexity_scoring._description: Complexity points assigned to each flow element type

risk_categories._description: Risk classification based on total complexity score

critical.label: Critical Risk
critical.recommendation: Segmentation required, consider refactoring into subflows

segment_templates._description: Pre-defined segment templates with complexity budgets

routing.description: Conditional routing and business logic branching

processing.description: Core business logic and record operations

imported_legacy.description: Auto-generated segment for pre-existing flow elements
imported_legacy.notes: Budget is calculated as: existing complexity * budget_multiplier

pattern_detection._description: Heuristics for auto-detecting logical segments in existing flows

indicators: Decision elements at flow start (first 3 positions)
Multiple decisions before any record operations
Position at end of flow or branches

complexity_below_threshold.title: Segmentation May Not Be Beneficial
complexity_below_threshold.message: This flow has a complexity score of {complexity}/{threshold}. Segmentation overhead may not be worthwhile.
complexity_below_threshold.recommendation: Consider using Quick Edit Mode for simpler changes, or use --force to enable segmentation anyway.

complexity_at_threshold.title: Segmentation Recommended
complexity_at_threshold.message: This flow has a complexity score of {complexity}. Segmentation will help manage changes safely.
complexity_at_threshold.recommendation: Enable segmentation to track changes by logical segment and maintain complexity budgets.

complexity_high.title: Segmentation Strongly Advised
complexity_high.message: This flow has a complexity score of {complexity} (High Risk). Segmentation is important for safe editing.
complexity_high.recommendation: Enable segmentation and consider extracting complex segments into subflows.

complexity_critical.title: Flow Refactoring Recommended
complexity_critical.message: This flow has a complexity score of {complexity} (Critical). Consider breaking into multiple subflows.
complexity_critical.recommendation: Use /flow-analyze-segments to identify extraction candidates, then /flow-extract-subflow to modularize.

segment_over_budget.title: Segment Over Budget
segment_over_budget.message: Segment '{segment}' has complexity {current}/{budget} points ({percentage}% of budget).
segment_over_budget.recommendation: Consider moving elements to another segment or extracting this segment as a subflow.

legacy_segment_created.title: Legacy Segment Created
legacy_segment_created.message: Existing elements have been placed in 'Imported_Legacy' segment with budget {budget}.
legacy_segment_created.recommendation: Review and optionally reorganize elements using /flow-interactive-build Stage 1.5.

segments_suggested.title: Segment Suggestions Available
segments_suggested.message: Analysis detected {count} logical segment pattern(s) in this flow.
segments_suggested.recommendation: Review suggestions in Stage 1.5 or run /flow-analyze-segments for detailed analysis.

quick_edit_mode._description: Configuration for Quick Edit Mode (bypass segmentation)

interactive_build_stages._description: Stage definitions for interactive flow building

stage_0.name: Complexity Analysis
stage_0.description: Analyze flow complexity and determine if segmentation is beneficial

stage_1.name: Flow Loading
stage_1.description: Load existing flow or create new flow structure

stage_1.5.name: Segment Suggestion Review
stage_1.5.description: Review auto-detected segment suggestions for existing flows

stage_3.name: Element Building
stage_3.description: Add elements to segments with budget tracking
